description: Monitor seismic activity in real-time with our Earthquake Monitor. Use the 'list_recent_quakes' tool to track earthquakes by the hour, day, or week, and filter by magnitude for precise insights. The 'significant_quakes' tool highlights major seismic events over the past month for in-depth analysis. Ideal for researchers, disaster response teams, and anyone interested in geological activity, this server provides essential data without the hassle of authentication.
